title: Detailed Flag
documentation:
## Purpose
A boolean flag that switches a machine's output from a summary or compact form to a fully detailed form, including additional fields, reasoning steps, or metadata.

## When to use
Enable when debugging a pipeline, generating audit logs, or when downstream consumers need richer output for further processing. Disable in production paths where compact output is sufficient and verbosity adds latency or cost.

## Notes
The additional fields produced when this flag is set are machine-specific. See [Output Length](https://capdag.com/browse/media:output-length;textable) for qualitative length control and [Require Explanation Flag](https://capdag.com/browse/media:require-explanation-flag;textable) when you specifically need the model to justify its answer.
